pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which reference this exact path
Web search results from multiple bioimage analysis sources confirming Mitosis sample is 171 x 196 pixels
Web search results from multiple bioimage analysis sources confirming Mitosis sample is 171 x 196 pixels
Task specification: Create a Sub-stack containing only frames 1-20 from original Mitosis sample (51 frames total)
Task specification: Split channels and keep ONLY the Red channel (Channel 1, Chromatin), close the Green channel. Original has 2 channels.
Task specification: Time Stamper interval is explicitly set to 15.00 seconds in the instructions

privileged_info_summary: The task processes the ImageJ Mitosis sample, a real 5D hyperstack (171 × 196 pixels, 2 channels, 5 Z-slices, 51 timeframes) containing HeLa cells with H2B-GFP chromatin staining. The metadata specifies the expected final output properties: 20 frames (cropped from 51), 1 channel (Red only after splitting), and a timestamp interval of 15 seconds. All claimed metadata values are correctly specified for the expected output of this image processing workflow.
